title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Puma India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!
